text:
🚨⤵️ Sami Khedira wants to join Real Madrid, as revealed yesterday. Several details still need to be clarified, including contract length. Nothing has been signed yet.


Florian Plettenberg (@Plettigoal)

🚨⏳ Sami Khedira on the verge of joining Real Madrid. 39 y/o World Cup winner is set to join José Mourinho’s coaching staff at Real as an assistant coach.

Khedira has given his green light. Final steps. @berger_pj 🇩🇪





— https://nitter.net/Plettigoal/status/2066279696300392908#m
